tree._: Live concern instances. Depth = temporal scale. Phase = (now - last) / period. Tier by depth: 1-2 deep, 3-4 present, 5 light. The phase function is the inverse Fourier transform at t=now. Constructive interference: multiple concerns ripe simultaneously = activity burst.

9._: Period map. Depth digit to seconds. The kernel reads this mechanically. The LLM reads the group _ text semantically. Both agree.
